# JD Product Stewardship Foundation

> The neutral, evidence-based authority that unites industry, regulators, and civil society to define harmonized standards, deliver trusted regulatory intelligence, and build the capabilities of product stewardship professionals worldwide.

## About
- [/en/about]: The foundation's story, mission, vision, values, leadership team, and advisory board structure.

## Services
- [/en/services]: Three service pillars — compliance foundation strengthening, regulatory intelligence, and professional capability building.

## Resources
- [/en/resources]: Downloadable resource library including core regulatory documents, professional development materials, and sector-specific insights.

## Contact
- [/en/contact]: General inquiry form, email, headquarters location (Montreal, Canada), and LinkedIn.

## Key Information
- Founded: 2024
- Mission: To act as the neutral, evidence-based authority that unites industry, regulators, and civil society — defining harmonized standards, delivering trusted regulatory intelligence, and building the capabilities of practitioners worldwide — so that responsible product decisions become the foundation every generation inherits.
- Sector: Product Stewardship / Environmental Compliance / Regulatory Affairs
- Headquarters: Montreal, Canada
- Website: https://jdproductstewardshipfoundation.org
- Email: info@jdproductstewardshipfoundation.org
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/jdpsf
- Languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese
